object.name: deleteEphemeralMessage
object.description: Use this method to delete an ephemeral message. Note that it is not guaranteed that the user will receive the message deletion event, especially if they are offline. Returns True on success.
object.html_description: Use this method to delete an ephemeral message. Note that it is not guaranteed that the user will receive the message deletion event, especially if they are offline. Returns True on success.
object.rst_description: Use this method to delete an ephemeral message. Note that it is not guaranteed that the user will receive the message deletion event, especially if they are offline. Returns :code:`True` on success.

annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format :code:`@username`
annotations.name: chat_id

annotations.description: Identifier of the user who received the message
